name: akira-desktop
description: Akira desktop app — same UI as the web frontend, uses backend APIs
author: Akira

scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:copy && electron-builder
scripts.build:frontend: cd ../frontend && cross-env VITE_BASE_PATH=./ npm run build
scripts.build:copy: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p=require('path'); const src=p.join(__dirname,'../frontend/dist'); const dest=p.join(__dirname,'dist'); fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});"
scripts.build:dir: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:copy && electron-builder --dir
scripts.pack: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:copy && electron-builder --dir
